behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file (billing.tsx), the query params (checkout, amount, session_id), and quotes the exact test case names that must pass.

no_solution_leakage.reason: The 'Code Structure Requirements' section explicitly states the fix: extract `amount` and `session_id` as local constants before the `useEffect` and use those primitives in the dependency array — this is precisely what solve.sh does.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests invoke the test runner by name and check behavior (toast called once, credits tracked once); any correct fix stabilizing effect deps would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute npm run test, lint, build, typecheck subprocesses rather than reading source text.

test_not_tautological.reason: The 'exactly once' assertions require proper implementation; stub components wouldn't render PaymentForm or fire trackCreditsPurchased correctly.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four required behaviors (success toast, error toast, credits tracking, renders payment form) map to dedicated test invocations.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test is named and documented with a docstring explaining pass_to_pass vs f2p purpose.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear consistent (frontend/src/routes/billing.tsx, npm run test, etc.).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates the exact structural fix (extract amount/session_id before useEffect and put primitives in dep array), which is the gold patch itself.
